title: SDAP DID Document
description: A DID Document for an SDAP agent, conforming to W3C DID Core 1.0 and extended with SDAP-specific properties. Published at https://<provider-domain>/.well-known/sdap/did/<agent-id>.

@context.description: JSON-LD contexts. MUST include the W3C DID Core context and the SDAP context.

id.description: The DID that this document describes. MUST be a valid did:sdap DID.

controller.description: DID of the controlling entity — typically the provider DID (did:sdap:<provider-domain> with no agent-id). The controller has the authority to update or deactivate this DID Document.

verificationMethod.description: Array of cryptographic public keys associated with this agent. MUST include at least one Ed25519VerificationKey2020 for authentication and at least one X25519KeyAgreementKey2020 for key agreement.

authentication.description: References to verification methods that may be used for agent authentication. Each entry MUST reference an Ed25519VerificationKey2020 in verificationMethod.

items.description: A DID URL reference to a verification method (e.g., did:sdap:example.com:agent#auth-key-1)

keyAgreement.description: References to verification methods that may be used for key agreement (ECDH). Each entry MUST reference an X25519KeyAgreementKey2020 in verificationMethod.

items.description: A DID URL reference to a key agreement method

service.description: Service endpoints for this agent. MUST include an A2AAgentEndpoint and an SDAPHandshakeEndpoint.

providerAttestation.description: A compact JWS (JWT) issued by the provider attesting to this agent's security posture, compliance certifications, and capabilities. The JWT is signed with the provider's Ed25519 authentication key. Expired or missing attestations reduce the maximum achievable security level for sessions with this agent.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this DID Document was first created.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this DID Document was last modified (key rotation, service update, etc.).

deactivated.description: If true, this DID has been deactivated and MUST NOT be used to establish new sessions. Resolvers receiving a deactivated document MUST surface this to callers.

sdap:agentType.description: Semantic type of this agent. 'orchestrator' agents coordinate other agents; 'specialist' agents perform specific domain tasks; 'tool' agents wrap external tools or APIs.

sdap:fleetId.description: Fleet identifier for deployments where multiple instances share a DID (fleet-DID pattern). All instances in the fleet share the same public keys and can be treated as equivalent for identity purposes.

sdap:instanceId.description: Instance identifier for per-instance DID deployments, or the specific instance identifier within a fleet. Used for fine-grained audit trail attribution.

sdap:supportedLayers.description: Which SDAP protocol layers (1–5) this agent supports. Layer 1 = Identity, 2 = Session/Handshake, 3 = Payload Security, 4 = Trust Delegation, 5 = Audit Trail.

sdap:minSecurityLevel.description: The minimum security level that initiating agents must negotiate when establishing sessions with this agent. Sessions proposed below this level MUST be rejected.

id.description: DID URL uniquely identifying this verification method within the DID Document (e.g., did:sdap:example.com:agent#auth-key-1).

type.description: The type of verification method. Ed25519VerificationKey2020 is used for authentication signatures; X25519KeyAgreementKey2020 is used for ECDH key agreement during session establishment.

controller.description: The DID that controls (owns) this key.

publicKeyMultibase.description: The public key encoded in Multibase format. For Ed25519, the key is 32 bytes; for X25519, the key is 32 bytes. The 'z' prefix indicates base58btc encoding.

revoked.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this key was revoked. Revoked keys are retained in the document for a grace period to allow in-flight session verification to complete.

id.description: DID URL identifying this service within the DID Document.

type.description: Type of service endpoint. A2AAgentEndpoint is the A2A protocol task endpoint; SDAPHandshakeEndpoint is the SDAP mutual-auth handshake endpoint.

serviceEndpoint.description: The HTTPS URL of the service. MUST use HTTPS; HTTP endpoints are not permitted.
